zh.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenne於1145年出生在英國諾福爾可堂納姆 韋斯特。她於1135年之前與Roger de Beaumont結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1225年5月9日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenne于1145年出生在英国諾福爾可堂納姆 韋斯特。她于1135年之前与Roger de Beaumont结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1225年5月9日在英国英格兰奧可福爾享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gundred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gundry
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Gondri, Gundric, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gund ‘battle’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenne was born in 1145, in Downham West, Norfolk, England. She married Roger de Beaumont before 1135. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 9 May 1225, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenne est née en 1145, à Downham West, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Roger de Beaumont avant 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1225, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenne wurde 1145 in Downham West, Norfolk, England geboren. Sie hat vor 1135 Roger de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1225 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenne è nata il nel 1145 nel Downham West, Norfolk, England. Lei sposato Roger de Beaumont prima del 1135. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 maggio 1225, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenneは1145年にイギリスノーフォルクダウンハム ウエストで生まれた。1135年以前にRoger de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1225年5月9日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenne(은)는 1145년 영국 노르폴크 다운함 웨스트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1135년 이전 Roger de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenne nasceu em 1145, em Downham West, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Roger de Beaumont antes 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1225, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gundred de Warenne родилась в 1145 г. в местности доунам вест, норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Beaumont перед 1135 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 мая 1225 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.
